arg.name: urdf_path
arg.description: Spherized URDF the CBF uses for FK + collision spheres.

arg.name: controlled_joint_names
arg.description: Joint names (as a YAML list) for the 6 controlled joints; must match the URDF.

arg.name: ee_frame_name
arg.description: Frame whose pose is queried against the SDF.

arg.name: sdf_host
arg.description: Address of the erl_gp_sdf_ros capnp RPC server (capnp_rpc.address).

arg.name: sdf_port
arg.description: Port of the erl_gp_sdf_ros capnp RPC server (capnp_rpc.port).

arg.name: sdf_timeout_sec
arg.description: Per-call timeout. The very first SDF query happens inside the CBF QP construction to size matrices; if the mapping node is still warming up that one call can take several seconds.

arg.name: sdf_wait_for_server_sec
arg.description: How long to block waiting for the capnp RPC server to start accepting TCP connections.

arg.name: sdf_schema_path
arg.description: Override path to sdf_query.capnp. Empty = autodiscover under AMENT_PREFIX_PATH.

arg.name: alpha_gain
arg.description: Class-K gain for the CBF: alpha(h) = alpha_gain * h. Larger ⇒ less conservative (brakes only near contact); smaller ⇒ wider standoff.

arg.name: publish_sphere_markers
arg.description: Publish per-link CBF spheres as a visualization_msgs/MarkerArray on 'cbf_spheres', coloured by clearance via the hot colormap.

arg.name: sphere_marker_d_red
arg.description: Sphere clearance (m) that maps to pure red on the hot colormap.

arg.name: sphere_marker_d_black
arg.description: Sphere clearance (m) at or above which markers fade to black (safe).

arg.name: sphere_marker_rate_hz
arg.description: Max publish rate for the marker topic; set 0 to disable.

arg.name: active_constraint_threshold
arg.description: A·u_nom + b threshold below which a constraint counts as 'active' (would be violated by the nominal command). Default 0 = strict violation.
